articles.title: Breaking: Gunshots Reported Near White House Correspondents’ Dinner as Security Tightens
articles.description: Security forces responded after gunshots were reported near the White House Correspondents’ Dinner, prompting emergency protocols and raising concerns over high-level security in Washington.
